learn.narration: Choose a course, listen, predict, then test the idea.

steps.title: Choose a short course
steps.body: Start with foundations; each course builds on the previous one.

steps.title: Listen or read
steps.body: Narration and the full written lesson teach the same reviewed content.

steps.title: Test your prediction
steps.body: Make a prediction before the local simulator reveals the result.

circuits.narration: Describe, inspect, step through, and export a circuit.
circuits.practical_action: Build a Bell circuit and step through H then CNOT.

steps.title: Describe the circuit
steps.body: Use plain language or switch to a declarative JSON or YAML manifest.

steps.title: Inspect before running
steps.body: The interpretation and diagram come from validated circuit IR.

steps.title: Follow each gate
steps.body: Step controls reveal amplitudes and entanglement after each operation.

use-cases.narration: Compare a real problem with its strongest classical and possible quantum approach.
use-cases.practical_action: Score one use case with the suitability questions.

steps.title: Choose a domain
steps.body: Filter by chemistry, logistics, security, public sector, and more.

steps.title: Compare methods
steps.body: Read the classical baseline before considering a quantum candidate.

steps.title: Test the claim
steps.body: Answer resource, evidence, and validation questions.

providers.narration: Choose the computing paradigm before choosing a provider.
providers.practical_action: Route one optimization task and one circuit task.

steps.title: State the task
steps.body: The router explains whether circuit, annealing, or classical-first work fits.

steps.title: Edit a QUBO
steps.body: Annealing expresses an optimization objective rather than a gate circuit.

benchmarking.narration: Separate measurements, forecasts, and provider claims.
benchmarking.practical_action: Assess one claim and record missing evidence.

steps.title: Pick an evidence view
steps.body: Progress, QPU fit, forecasts, digest, and claims answer different questions.

steps.title: Check provenance
steps.body: A benchmark needs workload, metric, device, date, method, and baseline.

improve.narration: Run a bounded plan and review loop with equivalence checks.
improve.practical_action: Review a redundant gate pair and open the HTML report.

steps.title: Define success
steps.body: State a measurable objective and bounded iteration count.

steps.title: Review the proposal
steps.body: Only equivalent simulated behavior with a better score is accepted.

podcast.narration: Build a listening queue for learning in the car or on a phone.
podcast.practical_action: Play an episode, change speed, and resume it.

steps.title: Play all
steps.body: Start the queue with one deliberate tap; playback never autostarts.

steps.title: Choose an episode
steps.body: Each episode includes chapters, a transcript, and a download.

community.narration: Submit research or volunteer to contribute and review.
community.practical_action: Choose one contribution path and review its privacy notice.

steps.title: Choose a role
steps.body: Submit research, apply to contribute, or apply to review.

steps.title: Control your data
steps.body: The form states purpose, retention, consent, privacy, and deletion options.
